description: Speakeasy provides an AI control plane for governing how AI agents connect to SaaS tools, internal APIs, and MCP servers, and also offers tooling to generate SDKs, CLIs, and MCP servers from OpenAPI documents.
summary: Speakeasy exposes a public HTTP Code Samples API at `https://codesamples.speakeasy.com` and a Speakeasy CLI; no public GraphQL API, first-party MCP connect endpoint, or machine-readable OpenAPI spec URL was confirmed from the domain docs.
